use_cases: Reveal reward or gift content after user completes a swipe gesture
Interactive unlock mechanism for loyalty programs and gamification
Progressive disclosure in onboarding flows requiring user action
Secure-feeling reveal for cashback or bonus content in fintech apps
ai_summary: A swipe-to-unlock component that requires users to drag a slider handle across a track to reveal hidden reward content. Built with Framer Motion, it calculates drag constraints dynamically and unlocks when the slider passes 80% of the track width. Features optional shimmer effects and snaps back if not fully unlocked, creating an engaging, gamified reveal experience ideal for reward cards, loyalty systems, and interactive promotional content.
